name: paradedb
description: MCP server for ParadeDB's blog posts, customer stories, and learn articles. Search and read ParadeDB's content for full-text search and analytics in Postgres.

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Keyword-search ParadeDB's blog, customer stories, and learn articles.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Fetch the full Markdown of a ParadeDB page by path or slug.

tools.name: list_content
tools.description: List all available ParadeDB content with titles and URLs.

tools.name: get_product_info
tools.description: Get a structured overview of ParadeDB and key links.
